name: Secret Detection
description: Scan source files for hardcoded secrets, API keys, credentials, and tokens. Uses pattern matching and entropy analysis to identify potential secret leaks.

parameters.name: paths
parameters.description: File paths or directories to scan for secrets

items.name: path
items.description: File path or glob pattern to scan

parameters.name: secretTypes
parameters.description: Types of secrets to detect. Omit for all types.

items.name: type
items.description: Secret type (api-key, password, token, private-key, connection-string, certificate)

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Paths or patterns to exclude from scanning

parameters.name: allowlistPatterns
parameters.description: Regex patterns for known-safe values to ignore (e.g. test fixtures)

outputDescription: Array of detected secrets: {type, file, line, snippet, confidence (high/medium/low), redactedValue}. Actual secret values are redacted in output.
author: openspace
